should_trigger: My EndeavourOS pacman update fails with invalid or corrupted package signature
NetworkManager on Arch connects to Wi-Fi but DNS resolution is broken
After mkinitcpio update my Arch system drops to emergency shell during boot
should_not_trigger: Troubleshoot Hyprland window rules for floating dialogs
Compare PostgreSQL ORMs for a Django app
Find where auth middleware is implemented in this repository

ambiguous.prompt: Hyprland on EndeavourOS has a black screen after an NVIDIA driver update
ambiguous.decision: Start with arch-linux-local when the driver/package update is the dominant clue, then use hyprland-local if compositor configuration evidence becomes central.
ambiguous.reason: The prompt crosses Arch packaging/GPU troubleshooting and Hyprland runtime behavior.

notes: Arch/Linux operating-system failures should route here even when another enabled skill may be used later.
